title: Paronychia pumila
taxonomy: Paronychia pumila is a species of flowering plant in the family Nyctaginaceae. It belongs to the genus Paronychia, which is a group of annual or perennial herbs. The family Nyctaginaceae is a small family of flowering plants commonly known as the four o'clock family. This family is part of the order Caryophyllales, a large group of flowering plants that also includes the carnation and the pinks. Paronychia pumila is native to South America.
